name: MalDatabase
tagline: Download the MalDatabase daily malware feed
description: Retrieve the current gzip-compressed MalDatabase malware feed for permitted internal or non-commercial use.

auth.hint: Send the MalDatabase API key as the raw Authorization header value. Review the provider's non-commercial-use restriction.

tools.name: download_daily_feed
tools.description: Download the gzip-compressed daily malware feed.

params.name: Accept-Encoding
params.description: Use gzip, deflate to request compressed transfer as shown by the provider.
